nodes.label: Default Album Art (Vinyl/CD Placeholder)
nodes.description: Square dark-gray placeholder image depicting a stylized vinyl record or CD disc. Centered concentric circles with a small spindle hole in the middle, rendered in near-monochrome charcoal/black tones. Used as a fallback artwork when no track album art is available.
nodes.style: minimal, monochrome, flat, dark charcoal (#2a2a2a / #1a1a1a), centered symmetric composition, low-contrast, placeholder aesthetic
nodes.depicts: vinyl record or CD disc with center label ring and spindle hole
nodes.purpose: fallback/default album artwork for DJ deck UI when metadata artwork missing
